name: Video Importer
description: Import GIF frames into the GD level editor as animated pixel art.

Frames.name: Frame Settings
Frames.description: Options for how frames are imported.

frame-limit.name: Frame limit
frame-limit.description: Max number of frames to import from the GIF.

anim-fps.name: Animation speed (FPS)
anim-fps.description: How fast the animation plays in-game. Higher = faster.

Pixels.name: Pixel Settings
Pixels.description: Options for how pixels are placed.

colour-channel.name: Colour channel
colour-channel.description: The colour channel used for the pixel objects.

pixel-size.name: Pixel size
pixel-size.description: Size of each pixel block in the editor.

base-group.name: Base group ID
base-group.description: Starting group ID for frame groups and animation triggers. Change this if it conflicts with groups already in your level.

Safety.name: Safety
Safety.description: Options to keep things from exploding.

size-limit.name: Pixel limit per frame
size-limit.description: Max number of pixels per frame. Raising this too high can crash the game.

disable-limit.name: Remove pixel limit
disable-limit.description: Removes the per-frame pixel limit. Not recommended unless you know what you're doing.

camera-follow.name: Camera follow
camera-follow.description: When the animation starts playing, the camera will lock onto the pixel art. Useful if your pixel art is far from the player start.
